template.description: B cannot happen before A. After it happens, it can not happen before the next A again.
template.name: alternate precedence

template.description: B cannot happen before A. After it happens, it can not happen before the next A again.
template.name: alternate precedence

template.description: B cannot happen before A. After it happens, it can not happen before the next A again.
template.name: alternate precedence

template.description: B cannot happen before A. After it happens, it can not happen before the next A again.
template.name: alternate precedence

template.description: Whenever activity Display Input Box-start is executed, activity Display Input Box-unknown has to be eventually executed afterwards.
template.name: response

statemessages.message:
There are two options when this constraint is satisfied:

  • Either task "A" has not been executed yet, or
  • Task "A" has been executed, and task "B" has been executed at least once after task "A".
This constraint is (permanently) violated when the instance is closed such that task "A" was executed, but task "B" was not executed after task "A".

This constraint is temporarily violated because task "A" has been executed, and task "B" was not executed after task "A".

Execute task "B" at least once to satisfy this constraint.

template.description: Display Input Box-unknown has to be preceded by Display Input Box-start. Display Input Box-unknown can happen only after Display Input Box-start had happened.
template.name: precedence

statemessages.message:
This constraint is satisfied because either:
  • task "B" was never executed, or
  • first task "A" was executed, and then task "B" was executed.
<html>This constraint is violated because task "B" was executed before task "A".</html>

template.description: B cannot happen before A. After it happens, it can not happen before the next A again.
template.name: alternate precedence

template.description: Whenever activity Display Input Box-complete is executed, activity Reason: Input Value Between Range-unknown has to be eventually executed afterwards.
template.name: response

statemessages.message:
There are two options when this constraint is satisfied:

  • Either task "A" has not been executed yet, or
  • Task "A" has been executed, and task "B" has been executed at least once after task "A".
This constraint is (permanently) violated when the instance is closed such that task "A" was executed, but task "B" was not executed after task "A".

This constraint is temporarily violated because task "A" has been executed, and task "B" was not executed after task "A".

Execute task "B" at least once to satisfy this constraint.

This constraint is (permanently) violated when the instance is closed such that task "A" was executed, but task "B" was not executed after task "A".

template.description: Whenever activity Clear Input Display Box-complete is executed, activity UNKNOWN_EVENT-unknown has to be eventually executed afterwards.
template.name: response

statemessages.message:
There are two options when this constraint is satisfied:

  • Either task "A" has not been executed yet, or
  • Task "A" has been executed, and task "B" has been executed at least once after task "A".
This constraint is (permanently) violated when the instance is closed such that task "A" was executed, but task "B" was not executed after task "A".

This constraint is temporarily violated because task "A" has been executed, and task "B" was not executed after task "A".

Execute task "B" at least once to satisfy this constraint.
